name: 24"x30" Jewel Tone Abstract Canvas Framed Art - Threshold™
description:
Elevate your space with the stunning 24"x30" Jewel Tone Abstract Canvas Framed Art from Threshold™. Featuring a captivating jewel-tone abstract design, this artwork showcases a blend of cool colors that harmonize beautifully, making it a striking focal point for any room. Set in a durable brown frame, this piece infuses modern elegance into your decor. With easy vertical orientation, this block print artwork is ready to hang and uplift your interiors in an instant.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
